title: ochna dolicharthros
intro: Ochna dolicharthros, also known as the small laurel, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ochna dolicharthros include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Ochna dolicharthros can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
